name: Romance Full of Life
overview: In-Sung has prepared for the examination to become a police officer for 4 years. He has failed the exam 8 times, but he still has a positive personality. He then applies for the high pay part-time job which is titled "Experiment Full of Life."

trailers.title: 《세가지색판타지 메이킹》생동성 연애 비하인드 - 인성의 삼각김밥 먹는 법
